# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not report security issues in public issues or pull requests.

Until a dedicated reporting channel is published, contact the maintainers privately through the repository hosting platform and include:

- A clear description of the issue
- The affected file types or endpoints
- Reproduction steps or a proof of concept
- Potential impact

## Supported Versions

There is no tagged public release yet. Security fixes will be evaluated against the current main branch until `v0.1.0` is published.
